creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
build in tinderbox with the following global options:
INSTALL_NODEBUG="yes"
A4=yes
WITH_UTF8=yes
WITHOUT_X11=yes
WITHOUT_X=yes
NO_PROFILE=true


and the following port-specific options:


PERL_VERSION=5.12.4
NOPORTDOCS=yes


The log file ends with:

test -z "/dev/null" || build/install-sh -c -d "/dev/null"
mkdir: /dev/null: File exists
mkdir: /dev/null: File exists
*** Error code 1

which is a bit strange

Fix: don't know

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: see above
